description: Plugin-distributed hooks for physical-therapy-practice. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags PT anti-patterns (timed CPT units with no 8-minute-rule/minute basis, billing/coding decision with no medical-necessity/documentation basis, cancellation framed as revenue-only with no adherence/episode framing). Set PT_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
